title: Mermaid configuration and diagram type detection utilities
purpose: Provides centralized configuration for Mermaid diagram rendering and utilities to detect diagram types and custom initialization directives.
module_context: Exports functions to check for custom Mermaid init directives, initialize Mermaid with appropriate theme settings, and detect design diagrams that use JSON format instead of Mermaid syntax.

steps.content: Test the input content against a regex pattern to detect presence of Mermaid init directive.
Return true if the pattern matches, indicating the diagram has its own init directive.
Return false if no init directive is found in the content.
Check if the diagram content contains a custom init directive.
Prepare a configuration object with default settings for Mermaid.
IF the diagram does not have a custom init directive, set the theme in the configuration.
Initialize Mermaid with the prepared configuration.
Test the content for legacy wireframe syntax to identify old Mermaid diagrams.
IF the legacy syntax is found, return true indicating it's a design diagram.
ELSE attempt to parse the content as JSON to check for viewport and screens properties.
IF JSON parsing succeeds and required properties are present, return true.
IF JSON parsing fails or required properties are missing, return false.
